name: Build a REST API
description: Build a complete REST API from requirements to deployment: design, implement, test, document, and deploy

steps.name: Requirements Gathering
steps.description: Understand what endpoints, data models, and business logic are needed. Clarify scope, authentication requirements, rate limiting, and integration points with other systems.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Clear list of endpoints, data models, and authentication requirements documented

steps.name: Architecture Design
steps.description: Design the API architecture: routing structure, middleware stack, database schema, error handling strategy, and response format conventions (REST/JSON:API/GraphQL).
steps.acceptance_criteria: Architecture document with endpoint specs, database schema, middleware design, and response format conventions

steps.name: Project Setup
steps.description: Initialize the project, install dependencies, configure the development environment, linter, formatter, and create the base project structure with a health check endpoint.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Project runs with GET /health returning 200, linter and formatter configured

steps.name: Data Models
steps.description: Implement database models, migrations, seed data, and the data access layer. Set up connection pooling, query helpers, and soft-delete if needed.
steps.acceptance_criteria: All models created, migrations run successfully, seed data loads correctly

steps.name: API Endpoints
steps.description: Implement all CRUD endpoints with proper request validation, error handling, pagination, filtering, sorting, and consistent response formatting.
steps.acceptance_criteria: All endpoints respond correctly to valid and invalid requests with proper HTTP status codes

steps.name: Authentication & Authorization
steps.description: Implement authentication (JWT, API keys, or OAuth). Add middleware for protected routes, token refresh, and role-based access control. Never store plain-text credentials.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Protected endpoints require valid auth, unauthorized requests return 401/403, tokens expire correctly

steps.name: Testing
steps.description: Write unit tests for business logic, integration tests for API endpoints, and edge case tests for error handling, auth, and pagination.
steps.acceptance_criteria: All tests pass, coverage above 80%, happy path and error cases both covered

steps.name: Documentation
steps.description: Generate OpenAPI/Swagger spec, write README with setup/run/test instructions, and document environment variables. Add example requests for every endpoint.
steps.acceptance_criteria: OpenAPI spec generated, README complete with setup and run instructions, all env vars documented

steps.name: Deployment Setup
steps.description: Create Dockerfile, docker-compose for local development, CI/CD pipeline, environment variable management, and production deployment guide.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Docker image builds, CI pipeline defined, deployment configuration ready for staging
